name: IT-W1-inngest-wiring: make every registered Inngest function wired-and-triggered
description: W1 (structural foundation, solo Item) — convert silent registration-sync to wired-and-triggered: every Inngest function registered is provably dispatched in production code (F-005, end-to-end feature-tracing rule; MMT-ADR-0009). Authority enforcement inside the functions is out of scope (W3). Depends on WP-W1-spine (triggers route through the spine).
acceptanceCriteria: No registered-but-untriggered Inngest function; a production dispatch site exists for each; durable async work routes through Inngest (no fire-and-forget). Findings: F-005. Source of truth: _wip/identity-foundation/2026-06-09-phase-o-master-plan.md §1 IT-W1-inngest-wiring (commit 23d0c01ad)
